scripts.contracts:generate: npm run contracts:sync-spec && npm run generate --workspace @workplace/api-contracts
scripts.contracts:check: npm run contracts:sync-spec && npm run check:generated --workspace @workplace/api-contracts
scripts.ci:backend: npm run lint --workspace backend-api && npm run typecheck --workspace backend-api && npm run test --workspace backend-api
scripts.ci:mobile: npm run lint --workspace mobile-app && npm run typecheck --workspace mobile-app && npm run test --workspace mobile-app && npm run contracts:check-fetch && npm run contracts:check
scripts.release:gates: npm run ci:backend && npm run ci:mobile
scripts.release:phase9: npm run release:gates && npm run test:integration --workspace backend-api && npm run test:security && npm run test:e2e:verify
